title: Add Mission Control Agent Factory with persistent reference sheets
summary: Introduced an Agent Factory UI and API that generates advanced agent profiles and stores full generated reference sheets per agent with versioned persistence.
changes: Added Agent Factory modal and sidebar entry point for rapid agent creation.
Added POST /api/agents/factory to create an agent plus generated SOUL/USER/AGENTS markdown and a full reference sheet.
Added agent_reference_sheets table and migration for persistent versioned docs.
risks: Reference sheet generation is deterministic template-based and may require manual refinement for edge-case agent roles.
rollback: Hide Agent Factory button and remove modal wiring in AgentsSidebar.
Remove new API routes and generator utility.
Keep migration applied but ignore table if feature disabled.
